verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Spirit of the Lord is great and mighty, The Spirit of the Lord is my victory, The Spirit of the Lord is great and mighty, Great and mighty in me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Greater is He that is in me than he that is in the world; I am more than a conqueror By the power of His word.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the name of Jesus, I can do anything; By the power of Your Spirit, You're the One who strengthens me.
